name: Aurora
description: Ultra-modern dark theme inspired by top-tier SaaS. Features soft glowing aurora gradients and glassmorphism.
font: "Plus Jakarta Sans", "Noto Sans JP", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif
css: body { background-color: #050505; background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 15% 50%, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.12), transparent 30vw), radial-gradient(circle at 85% 30%, rgba(192, 132, 252, 0.12), transparent 30vw); background-attachment: fixed; } body .bg-theme-surface, body .bg-white, body .card { box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); } body header, body aside, body .bg-theme-sidebar { backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); } body input:not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"]), body select, body textarea { transition: all 0.2s ease; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important; } body input:focus, body textarea:focus, body select:focus { background-color: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.9) !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2), inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important; outline: none; } body .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #8b5cf6 100%) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15) !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2) !important; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); color: white !important; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } body .btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2) !important; transform: translateY(-1px); filter: brightness(1.1); } body .btn-secondary { border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) !important; transition: all 0.2s ease; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) !important; } body .btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important; border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) !important; } .skin-sidebar-item { font-weight: 500 !important; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
